nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: it almost feels like the AI is able to read my mind

nodes.label: AI as rapid asset generator
nodes.grounding_span: it can just generate an asset for me based on my description

nodes.label: AI as quick visualization tool for own ideas
nodes.grounding_span: generate a concept image that I can then take into blender and start modeling from scratch

nodes.label: AI output quality and appropriateness
nodes.grounding_span: there is often inconsistencies and unwanted artifacts that appear

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: I have add AI into all aspects of the creative process

nodes.label: AI as threat to creative workforce
nodes.grounding_span: talented people will lose their jobs once AI can create production ready assets

nodes.label: AI as source of engaging content
nodes.label_negative: Backlash from users knowing AI was used
nodes.grounding_span: backlash from users if they know that AI was used to create some of the assets

nodes.label: Creative expression and vision realization
nodes.grounding_span: get much closer to what I was trying to achieve

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: greatly increase the time to create an asset

nodes.label: Professional integrity and ethical practice
nodes.grounding_span: talented people will lose their jobs

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: it felt both amazing and frustrating using AI for this as when it works, it is absolutely amazing

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: there is often inconsistencies and unwanted artifacts that appear. This can actually cause a lot of wasted time

nodes.label: Concern about job displacement
nodes.grounding_span: talented people will lose their jobs once AI can create production ready assets

nodes.label: Concern about user backlash
nodes.grounding_span: backlash from users if they know that AI was used to create some of the assets

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: we will start seeing more consistent results coming out of some of these newer AIs

nodes.label: Iterative experimentation and trial-and-error
nodes.grounding_span: With repeated prompts and retries to get a decent base

nodes.label: Pragmatic tool switching
nodes.grounding_span: Try a combination of either a fresh new chat to start the process over or try a different AI model
